title: agalmyla urdanetensis
intro: Agalmyla urdanetensis, also known as Urdaneta's agalmyla or Urdanetensis agalmyla, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly found in the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Agalmyla urdanetensis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to create teas, tonics, and other remedies.
